# Style Guide Playbook

## High-Value Rule Areas

- Naming.
- File and module conventions.
- Public API clarity.
- Comment and documentation style.
- Error and log message consistency.
- Test naming and structure where it matters.

## Governance Rules

- Automate deterministic rules.
- Keep reviewer judgment focused on intent and maintainability.
- Use examples for rules people misapply frequently.
- Revisit rules when architecture or tooling changes materially.

## Exception Rules

- Make exceptions explicit.
- Keep them narrow and justified.
- Reassess recurring exceptions as a sign the rule may be wrong.
